parties.name: CRAWFORD, ROCHELLE RENEE 2215R MARKET ST., APT. 494 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94114

calendar.matters:
Order To Show Cause For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause comes on calendar, having been transferred from Department 218, for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 210, VJ. Paul H. Alvarado, Clerk: L. Fiscella, CSR: J. Pond #5292.
Present in court: Petitioner Rochelle Renee Crawford, in propria persona.

It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all notices required by law have been given.
No objections to the proposed change of name made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that the Petitioner is not under the jurisdiction of the California Department of Corrections and Rehabilitation and is not required to register under Penal Code Section 290.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Rock Rene Crawford.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-14-2006 Assigned To Master Calendar
